name: Marcus Chen
bio: Former studio partner from Cornell. We share a passion for brutalist architecture and urban sketching.

name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Grew up on the same street in Portland. She's a professional wedding photographer now. Always has the best book recommendations.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: My first manager at the startup. Taught me everything about product management. We catch up monthly for coffee.

name: David 'Dax' Miller
bio: Met during a trekking trip in Patagonia. He's trying to hike all the National Parks. Very reliable climbing partner.

name: Amina Okafor
bio: Best friend from Lagos. We haven't spoken since she moved to London for her bar exam. Need to bridge the gap.

name: Jordan Smith
bio: Living in the apartment 4B. We swap recipes and occasionally host Sunday potlucks for the building.

name: Priya Kapoor
bio: University track team teammate. She's now a cardiologist in Chicago. We usually talk once a quarter.

name: Sam Wilson
bio: Part of my local D&D group. Great storyteller and always brings the best snacks to the sessions.

name: Chloe Zhao
bio: Co-founder at our last project. Expert in user experience and accessibility. We help each other with portfolio reviews.

name: Leo Valdes
bio: Played in the jazz ensemble together. He's a professional saxophonist now. Catching up every few weeks is a priority.

name: Sophie Martin
bio: Met during a yoga retreat in Bali. She lives in Paris but we try to do a monthly video call to stay connected.

name: Ahmed Mansour
bio: Bright junior developer I'm mentoring. We review his progress every week. He's learning Rust currently.
